name: Armadillo Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the jalapeno peppers in half lengthwise and remove all seeds (wear gloves). Keep both halves close together for later assembly.
2. Mix the Bisquick, raw sausage, and cheddar cheese.
3. Stuff each pepper half with Monterey Jack cheese.
4. Place the pepper halves back together.
5. Use a handful of the Bisquick mixture to mold around each pepper in an elongated egg shape.
6. Ensure the pepper is well covered with the mixture.
7. Dip each armadillo "egg" in beaten egg and roll in Shake 'n Bake.
8. Place on a broiler pan or cookie sheet and bake at 350°F for 25 minutes, or until crisp.
Posted by Sandra Stone
